name: Golden Hour
promptFragment: warm low-angle golden-hour sunlight, long soft-edged shadows and luminous atmospheric haze

name: Blue Hour
promptFragment: cool blue-hour ambient light with balanced practical lights and a deep cobalt sky

name: Studio Softbox
promptFragment: large studio softbox key light with smooth wrap, controlled fill and clean catchlights

name: Hard Rim
promptFragment: hard back rim light carving a bright edge around the subject against a darker background

name: Volumetric Fog
promptFragment: directional volumetric light shafts visible through fine atmospheric fog with layered depth

name: Neon Glow
promptFragment: saturated neon illumination with colored spill, glossy reflections and luminous edge bloom

name: Chiaroscuro
promptFragment: dramatic chiaroscuro lighting with a sculpted key, deep controlled shadow and painterly contrast

name: Overcast Diffuse
promptFragment: broad overcast daylight, exceptionally soft diffuse shadows and even natural skin tones

name: Candlelight
promptFragment: intimate flickering candlelight with warm falloff, soft amber highlights and deep surrounding shadow

name: Moonlight
promptFragment: cool directional moonlight with silver-blue highlights, subdued fill and nocturnal contrast
